Container.Name: AthenaScout
Container.Overview:
AthenaScout is a self-hosted book library completionist tracker. It syncs with your Calibre library and cross-references metadata sources like Goodreads, Hardcover, and Kobo to find books you're missing from authors and series you already collect.
Features include multi-source discovery, smart scanning, import/export, series intelligence, Calibre-Web deep linking, and a responsive web UI with dark/dim/light themes.
Container.Description: A self-hosted book library completionist tracker that syncs with Calibre and finds missing books via Goodreads, Hardcover, and Kobo.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the AthenaScout web interface

Config.Name: Calibre Library Path
Config.Description: Path to your Calibre library folder containing metadata.db (mounted read-only)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and settings

Config.Name: CALIBRE_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path to metadata.db inside the container

Config.Name: CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the Calibre library root inside the container

Config.Name: Hardcover API Key
Config.Description: API key from hardcover.app (include 'Bearer ' prefix). Leave empty to configure in web UI.

Config.Name: Calibre-Web URL
Config.Description: URL of your Calibre-Web instance for deep book links (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8083)

Config.Name: Calibre Library URL
Config.Description: URL of your Calibre content server for dashboard quick-access button

Config.Name: Calibre Sync Interval
Config.Description: Minutes between Calibre library re-syncs (0 to disable)

Config.Name: Source Scan Interval
Config.Description: Minutes between metadata source scans (4320 = 3 days, 0 to disable)

Config.Name: WEBUI_PORT
Config.Description: Internal web UI port (must match the port mapping above)
